faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Survivor's Path events, 3D passes, waitlists, and gate verification.
faq.a1: Once you register for an event, our platform dynamically generates a personalized 3D Glassmorphism Pass with a unique ticket ID and secure QR code. You can download it as a PDF or present it on your mobile device at the event gate.
faq.q2: What happens when an event reaches capacity?
faq.a2: When event seats are full, new registrants are automatically assigned to the Priority Waitlist. If an attendee cancels or additional capacity is released, waitlisted users are notified instantly.
faq.q3: How does Google Sheets synchronization work?
faq.a3: All registration records, attendee statuses, and support tickets are automatically synced in real-time to specific tabs in our Google Sheets base via Google Sheets API (or local persistent storage fallback).
faq.q4: Do I need an account to register for events?
faq.a4: Yes, our frictionless sign-in ensures your tickets are linked to your profile so you can access your digital wallet anytime under 'My Tickets'.
faq.q5: How is my digital ticket verified at the event gate?
faq.a5: Event organizers use our built-in QR Gate Scanner page to scan your ticket's QR code. The system checks the database in real-time to confirm attendee status and prevent duplicate check-ins.
faq.q6: Can I cancel my registration or transfer my ticket?
faq.a6: If you cannot attend, please submit a request on our Support page with your Ticket ID, and our team will update your ticket status or pass the seat to the next person on the waitlist.
